message:
feat: wire SIGINT handling and compaction

- Extract handleSigint() for testable SIGINT behavior (interrupt if running, exit if idle)
- Wire process.on("SIGINT") in interactive CLI mode
- Add compact callback to AgentFactoryResult
- Handle compact command by calling factory-provided callback
- Auto-trigger compaction when context tokens exceed 80% threshold
- Emit compaction event with summary and message counts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
